full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20917

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20917.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
crun-1.23.1-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
crun-1.23.1-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/crun-1.23.1-2.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:
[1.23.1-2]
- Backport multiple crun fixes
- Resolves: RHEL-114555
